name: Barbecued Pork Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless pork loin roasts, each weighing 1 1/2 to 2 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork roasts in an 8-quart Dutch oven. Add water and salt. Cover and cook on medium-low heat for 2-1/2 hours or until meat is tender.
2. Remove the roasted pork and shred with a fork. Set aside.
3. Skim fat from the cooking liquid and discard it.
4. Drain all but 1 cup of the cooking liquid.
5. Add shredded meat, ketchup, celery, steak sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, and lemon juice to the pot. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 1-1/2 hours.
6. Serve on buns.
